USN-8214-1: NLTK vulnerability
items.summary:
It was discovered that NLTK incorrectly handled file extraction when
opening a maliciously crafted zip file. An attacker could possibly use this
issue to create or overwrite files on the system and execute arbitrary
code.

items.title: USN-8202-2: jq vulnerabilities
items.summary:
USN-8202-1 fixed vulnerabilities in jq. This update provides the
corresponding update to Ubuntu 26.04 LTS.

Original advisory details:

 It was discovered that jq did not correctly handle certain string
 concatenations. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a
 denial  of service or execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-32316)

 It was discovered that jq did not correctly handle recursion in certain
 circumstances. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial
 of service.

items.title: USN-8213-1: Vim vulnerabilities
items.summary:
Michał Majchrowicz discovered that Vim's zip plugin could overwrite
arbitrary files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to delete
sensitive data or execute arbitrary code. This issue only affected
Ubuntu 24.04 LTS and Ubuntu 25.10. (CVE-2026-35177)

It was discovered that Vim's netbeans interface did not properly
sanitize certain strings. An attacker could possibly use this issue to
execute arbitrary commands. (CVE-2026-39881)

items.title: USN-8212-1: authd vulnerability
items.summary:
It was discovered that authd incorrectly assigned the primary group ID to
users under certain conditions. A local attacker could possibly use this
issue to achieve privilege escalation, or gain unauthorized access to files
belonging to other users.
